title: System able to ignore auto-responder email
excerpt: Request a feature of the update will not receive auto-responder email in Update. for eg. can set consideration if have email with “Away from Office” then the auto responder email will not post on update.

posts.author: Wildman (KC Low)
posts.cookedHtml: Request a feature of the update will not receive auto-responder email in Update. for eg. can set consideration if have email with “Away from Office” then the auto responder email will not post on update.
